root_text.an10.237:1.3: Asubhasaññā, maraṇasaññā, āhāre paṭikūlasaññā, sabbaloke anabhiratasaññā, aniccasaññā, anicce dukkhasaññā, dukkhe anattasaññā, pahānasaññā, virāgasaññā, nirodhasaññā—
root_text.an10.237:1.4: rāgassa, bhikkhave, abhiññāya ime dasa dhammā bhāvetabbā”ti.

translation_text.an10.237:1.1: “For insight into greed, ten things should be developed.
translation_text.an10.237:1.3: The perceptions of ugliness, death, repulsiveness of food, dissatisfaction with the whole world, impermanence, suffering in impermanence, and not-self in suffering, giving up, fading away, and cessation.
translation_text.an10.237:1.4: For insight into greed, these ten things should be developed.”
